positive: Stylized abstract geometric mountain range at sunrise, rendered as a seamless repeating pattern suitable for apparel, featuring sharp, clean lines and bold, saturated color gradients of deep indigo, fiery orange, and teal. The composition should focus on clean silhouettes and strong contrast against a sky background, resembling a minimalist woodblock print combined with vaporwave aesthetics. Perfect central placement, highly detailed, high contrast, perfect print quality.
